message:
fix(fr-command): INFO server emits upstream-aligned 21-field set [bd-frankenredis-infoserver]

INFO server was emitting only 16 fields. Upstream Redis 7.2
server.c::genRedisInfoString emits 21. Added the 5 missing
fields, also reverted the over-added pubsub_clients +
watching_clients from INFO clients (those are Redis 7.4+; not in
7.2.4):

  + atomicvar_api:c11-builtin
  + process_supervised:no
  + server_time_usec:<now_ms*1000>
  + io_threads_active:0
  + listener0:name=tcp,bind=*,bind=-::*,port=<port>
  - pubsub_clients (removed; Redis 7.4+)
  - watching_clients (removed; Redis 7.4+)

Field order matches upstream's emission order so byte-for-byte
diff harnesses now match the prefix sequence verbatim.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
